A smuggler and a young girl travel across a post-apocalyptic US infected by a mutant Cordyceps fungus.
Follows outlaw Arthur Morgan as he deals with the decline of the Wild West while surviving government forces.
A Spartan warrior takes his son on a journey to spread his deceased wife's ashes from the highest peak.
An amnesiac detective must solve a murder mystery while his internal skills talk to him.
A plane crash survivor explores the underwater objectivist utopia of Rapture, discovering its dark secrets.
An FBI agent and a novelist navigate a dark supernatural reality in the town of Bright Falls.
A monster hunter searches for his adopted daughter who is fleeing from an otherworldly hunt.
Androids 2B and 9S fight a proxy war for mankind against an army of machines sent by aliens.
Commander Shepard must assemble a diverse team to stop an insectoid alien race known as the Collectors.
Chell awakens in a ruined Aperture Science facility and is forced to solve puzzles by the AI GLaDOS.
Peter Parker balances his personal life while battling Mister Negative and the Sinister Six.
Three androids discover what it means to be human as they face prejudice in a futuristic society.
A woman returns to her family's cursed home to explore the tragic stories of her deceased relatives.
A fire lookout in the Wyoming wilderness unravels a mystery with his supervisor over a walkie-talkie.
A photography student discovers she can rewind time and tries to prevent a storm from destroying her town.
Lee Everett protects a young girl named Clementine during a zombie apocalypse.
A samurai struggles with his honorable code as he fights to protect his island from a Mongol invasion.
A mercenary known as V deals with a cybernetic implant threatening to overwrite their personality.
A Delta Force squad's mission in a ruined Dubai turns into a psychological nightmare about war crimes.
A man wakes up in an underwater research facility and questions the nature of human consciousness and AI.
